$comment: Sintrix in-the-loop safety gate. ha-mcp READ tools are pre-allowed (in 'allow') for friction-free exploration. WRITE/REMOVE tools are intentionally LEFT OUT so they prompt for the integrator's approval via Claude Code's default behaviour. Do NOT add a blanket 'ask: [mcp__ha]' — an 'ask' rule overrides specific 'allow' rules and would make read tools prompt too. Server is named 'ha' in .mcp.json. If you rename it, update the 'mcp__ha__' prefixes below.
